<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>The Health Trend – Fresh Perspective, Healthier You</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400&family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,300;9..40,400;9..40,500;9..40,600;9..40,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script async src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-7598370240312786"
     crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
<style>
:root{
  --navy:#1a3a5c;--blue:#2563a8;--green:#6db33f;--lgreen:#8fd45a;
  --cream:#f4f8f2;--dark:#111827;--gray:#6b7280;--light:#eef4fb;--border:#e2e8f0;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;color:var(--dark);background:#fff;overflow-x:hidden}
img{display:block;max-width:100%;object-fit:cover}

/* ── TOPBAR ── */
.topbar{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0b1e38,#0e3320);padding:.45rem 2.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem}
.topbar-msg{font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem}
.topbar-msg strong{color:var(--lgreen)}
.topbar-links{display:flex;gap:1.5rem;flex-shrink:0}
.topbar-links a{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}
.topbar-links a:hover{color:var(--lgreen)}

/* ── NAV ── */
.navbar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:1000;background:rgba(255,255,255,.98);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.07),0 6px 36px rgba(26,58,92,.07);transition:box-shadow .3s}
.navbar.scrolled{box-shadow:0 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.09),0 14px 52px rgba(26,58,92,.12)}
.nav-inner{max-width:1360px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 2.8rem;height:96px}
.nav-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;text-decoration:none;flex-shrink:0}
.nav-brand img{height:78px;width:auto;transition:transform .25s,filter .25s}
.nav-brand:hover img{transform:scale(1.04);filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 14px rgba(109,179,63,.38))}
.nav-brand-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:1.1}
.nbt-eyebrow{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gray)}
.nbt-name{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.22rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--navy)}
.nbt-name span{color:var(--green)}
.nbt-tagline{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--gray);font-style:italic}
.nav-menu{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.1rem;list-style:none}
.nav-menu a{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;padding:.58rem .98rem;border-radius:10px;font-size:.875rem;font-weight:500;color:#374151;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;transition:background .18s,color .18s}
.nav-menu a .ni{font-size:.8rem;opacity:.6;transition:opacity .18s}
.nav-menu a:hover{background:var(--light);color:var(--blue)}
.nav-menu a:hover .ni{opacity:1}
.nav-menu a.active{color:var(--blue);background:var(--light)}
.nav-divider{width:1px;height:24px;background:var(--border);margin:0 .4rem;flex-shrink:0}
.nav-cta{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--green),#4a9a2a)!important;color:#fff!important;font-weight:700!important;padding:.68rem 1.55rem!important;border-radius:10px!important;box-shadow:0 3px 16px rgba(109,179,63,.38)!important}
.nav-cta:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4a9a2a,var(--blue))!important;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(109,179,63,.5)!important;transform:translateY(-1px)}
.hamburger{display:none;cursor:pointer;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;padding:8px;background:none;border:none}
.hamburger span{display:block;width:27px;height:2.5px;background:var(--navy);border-radius:3px;transition:all .3s}

/* ── SHARED ── */
section{padding:5.5rem 2.8rem}
.container{max-width:1360px;margin:0 auto}
.sec-label{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;background:var(--light);color:var(--blue);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.36rem .95rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:.85rem;border:1px solid rgba(37,99,168,.16)}
.sec-title{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,2.8vw,2.7rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);line-height:1.22}
.sec-title em{color:var(--green);font-style:normal}
.sec-sub{color:var(--gray);margin-top:.8rem;font-size:1.02rem;line-height:1.75;max-width:580px}
.btn-green{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;background:var(--green);color:#fff;padding:.7rem 1.7rem;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s}
.btn-green:hover{background:#5aa030;transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-navy{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;background:var(--navy);color:#fff;padding:.7rem 1.7rem;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s}
.btn-navy:hover{background:#152e4d;transform:translateY(-2px)}
.tag{display:inline-block;background:var(--cream);color:var(--blue);font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;padding:.2rem .7rem;border-radius:100px;border:1px solid var(--border)}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{min-height:100vh;background:linear-gradient(140deg,rgba(10,26,52,.93),rgba(18,62,38,.88) 55%,rgba(8,22,48,.93)),url('https://images.pexels.com/photos/1552252/pexels-photo-1552252.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1400&h=800&dpr=1') center/cover no-repeat;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:80px 2.8rem 60px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:130px;background:linear-gradient(to top,#fff,transparent);pointer-events:none}
.hero-inner{max-width:1360px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;gap:4.5rem;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.45rem;background:rgba(143,212,90,.14);border:1px solid rgba(143,212,90,.35);color:var(--lgreen);font-size:.73rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:.43rem 1.05rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:1.7rem}
.hero h1{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:clamp(2.5rem,4.2vw,3.8rem);font-weight:900;color:#fff;line-height:1.12;margin-bottom:1rem}
.hero h1 em{color:var(--lgreen);font-style:normal;display:block}
.hero-italic{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.12rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.58);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.hero-desc{color:rgba(255,255,255,.72);line-height:1.77;margin-bottom:2.4rem;font-size:1rem;max-width:520px}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:2.2rem;margin-top:2.8rem;padding-top:2.5rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);flex-wrap:wrap}
.hstat strong{display:block;font-size:1.95rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--lgreen);line-height:1}
.hstat span{font-size:.76rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.48);margin-top:.18rem;display:block}
.hero-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1rem}
.htcard{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border-radius:16px;padding:1.25rem 1.45rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.15rem;transition:all .25s}
.htcard:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.16);transform:translateX(5px)}
.htcard-icon{width:50px;height:50px;border-radius:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.4rem;flex-shrink:0}
.htcard h3{color:#fff;font-size:.93rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.18rem}
.htcard p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:.76rem;line-height:1.5}

/* ── TOPICS — image + text side by side ── */
#topics{background:var(--cream)}
.topics-intro{text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto 4rem}
.topics-intro .sec-sub{margin:0 auto}
.topics-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4rem}
.topic-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0;border-radius:24px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.08);background:#fff}
.topic-row.rev{direction:rtl}
.topic-row.rev>*{direction:ltr}
.topic-img{height:100%;min-height:340px;background-size:cover;background-position:center;position:relative}
.topic-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.topic-body{padding:3rem 3.2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.topic-body .topic-icon{font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem}
.topic-body h3{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.9rem;line-height:1.28}
.topic-body p{color:var(--gray);line-height:1.78;margin-bottom:1.2rem;font-size:.96rem}
.topic-body .tag-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1.4rem}
.topic-vid-inline{margin-top:1.2rem;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;position:relative}
.topic-vid-inline img{width:100%;height:170px;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.topic-vid-inline .play-over{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s}
.topic-vid-inline:hover .play-over{background:rgba(0,0,0,.18)}
.play-circle{width:52px;height:52px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:transform .2s,background .2s}
.play-circle::after{content:"▶";color:var(--navy);font-size:.95rem;padding-left:3px}
.topic-vid-inline:hover .play-circle{transform:scale(1.1);background:var(--green)}
.topic-vid-inline:hover .play-circle::after{color:#fff}
.vid-label{padding:.7rem 1rem;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);color:#fff;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500}

/* ── ABOUT ── */
#about{background:#fff}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:center}
.about-imgcol{position:relative}
.about-main-img{border-radius:24px;overflow:hidden;height:520px;box-shadow:0 12px 60px rgba(26,58,92,.18)}
.about-main-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
.about-badge{position:absolute;bottom:-1rem;right:-1rem;background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:1.1rem 1.4rem;box-shadow:0 8px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.12);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.9rem}
.ab-icon{width:46px;height:46px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--green),#4a9a2a);border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.3rem;flex-shrink:0}
.ab-text strong{display:block;font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--navy)}
.ab-text span{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--gray)}
.about-text p{color:var(--gray);line-height:1.78;margin-bottom:1.1rem;font-size:.97rem}
.pillars{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;margin:1.8rem 0}
.pillar{background:var(--cream);border-radius:12px;padding:1.1rem 1.3rem;border-left:3px solid var(--green)}
.pillar h4{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.25rem}
.pillar p{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--gray);margin:0}
.who-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy),#1e5080);border-radius:22px;padding:3rem;margin-top:4rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;align-items:center}
.who-text h3{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.55rem;color:#fff;margin-bottom:1rem}
.who-text p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);line-height:1.78;font-size:.95rem;margin-bottom:.9rem}
.chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:.5rem}
.chip{background:rgba(255,255,255,.11);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22);color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);border-radius:100px;padding:.3rem .9rem;font-size:.77rem}
.who-img{border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;height:300px}
.who-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}

/* ── ARTICLES ── */
#articles{background:var(--cream)}
.art-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:3rem}
.arts-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2rem}
.acard{border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.07);transition:transform .3s,box-shadow .3s;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.acard:hover{transform:translateY(-7px);box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(26,58,92,.13)}
.acard.feat{grid-column:span 3;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr;border-radius:24px}
.acard.feat:hover{transform:translateY(-5px)}
.aimg{height:220px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;flex-shrink:0}
.aimg img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .5s}
.acard:hover .aimg img{transform:scale(1.06)}
.acard.feat .aimg{height:100%;min-height:320px}
.acat{position:absolute;top:1rem;left:1.2rem;z-index:2;background:var(--green);color:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:.25rem .7rem;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em}
.abody{padding:1.55rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;flex:1}
.acard.feat .abody{padding:2.4rem;justify-content:center}
.ameta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.42rem;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.ameta span{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--gray)}
.adot{width:3px;height:3px;background:var(--gray);border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.abody h3{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.5rem;line-height:1.38}
.acard.feat .abody h3{font-size:1.5rem}
.abody p{color:var(--gray);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.68;margin-bottom:1rem;flex:1}
.alink{color:var(--blue);font-size:.83rem;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem;margin-top:auto}
.alink:hover{color:var(--green)}
.anew{position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1.2rem;z-index:2;background:rgba(255,210,0,.92);color:#111;border-radius:6px;padding:.2rem .55rem;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}

/* ── ARTICLE FILTER ── */
.af-bar{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:2.2rem}
.af-btn{background:var(--light);color:#374151;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;padding:.45rem 1.1rem;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.af-btn:hover{border-color:var(--blue);color:var(--blue)}
.af-btn.active{background:var(--green);color:#fff;border-color:var(--green);box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(109,179,63,.3)}

/* ── VIDEOS SECTION — rich layout ── */
#videos{background:var(--navy);padding:5.5rem 2.8rem}
.vids-hdr{text-align:center;margin-bottom:3.5rem}
.vids-hdr .sec-label{background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);color:var(--lgreen);border-color:rgba(143,212,90,.28)}
.vids-hdr .sec-title{color:#fff}
.vids-hdr .sec-sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);margin:0 auto}
.vids-featured{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.55fr 1fr;gap:2rem;margin-bottom:2rem}
.vid-big{border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;position:relative;background:#000}
.vid-big img{width:100%;height:380px;object-fit:cover;opacity:.88;transition:opacity .3s,transform .4s;display:block}
.vid-big:hover img{opacity:.7;transform:scale(1.03)}
.vid-big-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;padding:2rem;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,.75) 0%,transparent 55%)}
.vid-big .play-circle{width:68px;height:68px;position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:transform .25s,background .25s;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.vid-big .play-circle::after{content:"▶";color:var(--navy);font-size:1.3rem;padding-left:4px}
.vid-big:hover .play-circle{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.12);background:var(--green)}
.vid-big:hover .play-circle::after{color:#fff}
.vid-big-meta span{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);padding:.2rem .65rem;border-radius:100px}
.vid-big-meta{display:flex;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.6rem;align-items:center}
.vid-big h3{color:#fff;font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1.32}
.vids-side{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.2rem}
.vid-small{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;display:flex;gap:0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);transition:background .2s,transform .2s}
.vid-small:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.13);transform:translateX(4px)}
.vid-small-thumb{width:130px;flex-shrink:0;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.vid-small-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .4s}
.vid-small:hover .vid-small-thumb img{transform:scale(1.08)}
.vid-small-play{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.32);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.vid-small-play .play-circle{width:38px;height:38px}
.vid-small-play .play-circle::after{font-size:.7rem;padding-left:2px}
.vid-small:hover .vid-small-play .play-circle{background:var(--green)}
.vid-small:hover .vid-small-play .play-circle::after{color:#fff}
.vid-small-info{padding:1rem 1.2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center}
.vid-small-info h4{color:#fff;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.35rem;line-height:1.38}
.vid-small-info p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);font-size:.75rem}

/* ── VIDEO MODAL ── */
.vmodal{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2000;background:rgba(0,0,0,.88);align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:2rem}
.vmodal.open{display:flex}
.vmodal-box{position:relative;width:100%;max-width:960px;aspect-ratio:16/9;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 28px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}
.vmodal-box iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none;display:block}
.vmodal-close{position:absolute;top:-3rem;right:0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:none;color:#fff;width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:1.1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s}
.vmodal-close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}

/* ── REVIEWS ── */
#reviews{background:#fff}
.rev-intro{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:2.8rem}
.rev-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1.6rem}
.rcard{background:var(--cream);border-radius:20px;padding:2rem;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s}
.rcard:hover{border-color:var(--green);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(109,179,63,.1)}
.stars{color:#f59e0b;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:.85rem;font-size:.88rem}
.rq{font-size:3rem;color:var(--lgreen);line-height:.75;margin-bottom:.7rem;font-family:Georgia,serif}
.rcard p{color:#4b5563;line-height:1.72;font-size:.93rem;margin-bottom:1.6rem;font-style:italic}
.reviewer{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.9rem}
.ravatar{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy),var(--blue));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;flex-shrink:0}
.rname{font-size:.87rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy)}
.rrole{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--gray)}

/* ── NEWSLETTER ── */
.nl-band{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d2a44,#1a5c3a);padding:5rem 2.8rem}
.nl-inner{max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center}
.nl-inner h2{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:2rem;color:#fff;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.nl-inner p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.62);margin-bottom:2.2rem;font-size:1rem}
.nl-form{display:flex;gap:.8rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.nl-form input{flex:1;min-width:210px;padding:.88rem 1.2rem;border-radius:10px;border:none;font-size:.9rem;outline:none;font-family:inherit}
.nl-form button{background:var(--green);color:#fff;border:none;padding:.88rem 1.8rem;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;font-size:.9rem;transition:background .2s;white-space:nowrap}
.nl-form button:hover{background:#5aa030}
.nl-note{font-size:.73rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.38);margin-top:.9rem}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
#contact{background:var(--cream)}
.ct-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.6fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start}
.ct-info .sec-sub{max-width:100%}
.cdetail{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:1rem;margin-top:1.7rem}
.cicon{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--light);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.15rem;flex-shrink:0}
.cdetail h4{font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.18rem}
.cdetail p{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--gray)}
.cf-box{background:#fff;border-radius:24px;padding:2.8rem;box-shadow:0 4px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.07)}
.cf-box h3{font-family:"Playfair Display",serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:1.75rem}
.f-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1.1rem}
.fg{margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.fg label{display:block;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--navy);margin-bottom:.4rem;letter-spacing:.02em}
.fg input,.fg select,.fg textarea{width:100%;padding:.76rem 1rem;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--cream);font-family:inherit;font-size:.88rem;transition:border-color .2s;outline:none;color:var(--dark)}
.fg input:focus,.fg select:focus,.fg textarea:focus{border-color:var(--blue);background:#fff}
.fg textarea{min-height:120px;resize:vertical}
.f-btn{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--green),#4a9a2a);color:#fff;border:none;padding:.92rem;border-radius:12px;font-size:.94rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s}
.f-btn:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4a9a2a,var(--blue));transform:translateY(-1px)}
.f-ok{display:none;background:#f0fdf4;border:1px solid #86efac;color:#166534;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem 1.3rem;margin-top:1.1rem;font-size:.87rem;font-weight:500}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{background:#0b1828;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)}
.footer-top{max-width:1360px;margin:0 auto;padding:4.5rem 2.8rem 3rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:3.5rem}
.fbrand img{height:66px;width:auto;margin-bottom:1.1rem}
.fbrand p{font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.72;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4)}
.fsocial{display:flex;gap:.6rem;margin-top:1.4rem}
.fslink{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);text-decoration:none;font-size:.88rem;transition:all .2s}
.fslink:hover{background:var(--green);color:#fff}
.fcol h4{color:#fff;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.3rem}
.fcol a{display:block;color:rgba(255,255,255,.43);text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:.6rem;transition:color .2s}
.fcol a:hover{color:var(--lgreen)}

/* ── LEGAL IN FOOTER ── */
.footer-legal-bar{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);background:#081422}
.footer-legal-inner{max-width:1360px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 2.8rem}
.legal-tabs-row{display:flex;gap:0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.legal-tab-btn{padding:1.1rem 1.6rem;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,.42);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;transition:all .22s;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;white-space:nowrap}
.legal-tab-btn:hover{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)}
.legal-tab-btn.active{color:var(--lgreen);border-bottom-color:var(--lgreen)}
.legal-content{padding:2.5rem 0 3rem}
.legal-panel{display:none;animation:fadeUp .3s ease}
.legal-panel.active{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2.5rem}
.legal-panel.single{display:none}
.legal-panel.single.active{display:block;max-width:860px}
.legal-col h3{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);margin-bottom:.85rem;padding-bottom:.6rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.legal-col p,.legal-col li{font-size:.82rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.42);line-height:1.72;margin-bottom:.55rem}
.legal-col ul{padding-left:1.2rem}
.legal-col li{margin-bottom:.4rem}
.legal-col strong{color:rgba(255,255,255,.62)}
.legal-warn{background:rgba(255,220,50,.07);border:1px solid rgba(255,220,50,.2);border-radius:10px;padding:.9rem 1.1rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem;grid-column:span 3}
.legal-warn p{color:rgba(255,220,120,.75);font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;margin:0}
.footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.footer-bottom-inner{max-width:1360px;margin:0 auto;padding:1.6rem 2.8rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem}
.footer-bottom p{font-size:.77rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25)}

@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media(max-width:1200px){
  .nav-inner{padding:0 1.8rem}
  .arts-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
}
@media(max-width:1080px){
  .hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hero-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .topic-row,.topic-row.rev{grid-template-columns:1fr;direction:ltr}
  .topic-img{min-height:260px}
  .vids-featured{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .vids-side{flex-direction:row;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .vid-small{flex:1;min-width:260px}
  .who-box{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .who-img{display:none}
  .arts-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .acard.feat{grid-column:span 2}
}
@media(max-width:900px){
  .hamburger{display:flex}
  .nav-menu{position:fixed;top:96px;left:0;right:0;background:#fff;flex-direction:column;padding:1.4rem;gap:.2rem;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.12);transform:translateY(-110%);transition:transform .3s;z-index:999;align-items:stretch;max-height:calc(100vh - 96px);overflow-y:auto}
  .nav-menu.open{transform:translateY(0)}
  .nav-menu a{padding:.85rem 1.1rem;width:100%;border-radius:8px}
  .nav-divider{display:none}
  .about-grid,.ct-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .arts-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .acard.feat{grid-column:span 2;display:grid}
  .rev-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .footer-top{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .f-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .legal-panel.active{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .legal-warn{grid-column:span 1}
  .legal-tabs-row{flex-wrap:wrap}
  section{padding:4.5rem 1.8rem}
  .hero{padding:70px 1.8rem 50px}
  .about-main-img{height:380px}
  .about-badge{right:.5rem;bottom:.5rem}
  .who-box{padding:2rem;gap:1.5rem}
  .vids-hdr .sec-sub{max-width:100%}
  .nl-band{padding:4rem 1.8rem}
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  section{padding:3.5rem 1.2rem}
  .hero{padding:60px 1.2rem 40px;min-height:auto}
  .hero-inner{gap:2.5rem}
  .hero h1{font-size:clamp(2rem,7vw,2.8rem)}
  .hero-cards,.rev-grid,.arts-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .acard.feat{grid-column:span 1;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
  .acard.feat .aimg{min-height:220px}
  .footer-top{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .pillars{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hero-stats{gap:1.2rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .hero-stats .hstat{min-width:calc(50% - .6rem)}
  .topbar,.nav-brand-text{display:none}
  .vids-side{flex-direction:column}
  .nav-inner{padding:0 1.2rem;height:72px}
  .nav-brand img{height:60px}
  .nl-band{padding:3rem 1.2rem}
  .nl-form{flex-direction:column}
  .nl-form input,.nl-form button{width:100%}
  .rev-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .cf-box{padding:1.8rem 1.4rem}
  .ct-grid{gap:2.5rem}
  .footer-top{padding:3rem 1.2rem 2rem}
  .footer-bottom-inner{flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem;padding:1.2rem}
  .hero-btns{flex-direction:column}
  .hero-btns a{text-align:center;justify-content:center}
  .aimg{height:190px}
  .topics-intro{padding:0 .3rem}
  .topic-body{padding:2rem 1.6rem}
}
@media(max-width:420px){
  .hero-stats .hstat{min-width:100%}
  .hstat strong{font-size:1.6rem}
  .nav-brand img{height:52px}
  section{padding:3rem 1rem}
  .hero{padding:55px 1rem 35px}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- TOPBAR -->
<div class="topbar">
  <p class="topbar-msg">🌿 <strong>New:</strong> Tabata Training, Epigenetics & Black Rain — Fresh Articles Now Live</p>
  <div class="topbar-links"><a href="#about">About</a><a href="#articles">Articles</a><a href="#contact">Contact</a></div>
</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav class="navbar" id="navbar">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a href="#home" class="nav-brand">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="The Health Trend">
      <div class="nav-brand-text">
        <span class="nbt-eyebrow">Est. 2024</span>
        <span class="nbt-name">The <span>Health</span> Trend</span>
        <span class="nbt-tagline">Fresh Perspective, Healthier You</span>
      </div>
    </a>
    <ul class="nav-menu" id="navMenu">
      <li><a href="#home"><span class="ni">🏠</span> Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="#topics"><span class="ni">🌿</span> Topics</a></li>
      <li><a href="#about"><span class="ni">👥</span> About</a></li>
      <li><a href="#articles"><span class="ni">📰</span> Articles</a></li>
      <li><a href="#videos"><span class="ni">🎬</span> Videos</a></li>
      <li><a href="#reviews"><span class="ni">⭐</span> Reviews</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact"><span class="ni">✉️</span> Contact</a></li>
      <div class="nav-divider"></div>
      <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Get Updates ✦</a></li>
    </ul>
    <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger" aria-label="Menu"><span></span><span></span><span></span></button>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div>
      <span class="hero-pill">🌱 Evidence-Based Health Content</span>
      <h1>Your Guide to<br><em>Modern Wellness</em></h1>
      <p class="hero-italic">"Fresh Perspective, Healthier You"</p>
      <p class="hero-desc">Discover science-backed insights on mental health, nutrition, fitness, stress management and sleep — all in one trusted destination built for real people.</p>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <a href="#articles" class="btn-green" style="font-size:.94rem;padding:.88rem 2rem">📖 Explore Articles</a>
        <a href="#topics" style="border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.32);color:#fff;padding:.88rem 1.8rem;border-radius:12px;font-weight:600;font-size:.94rem;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;transition:all .25s" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#8fd45a';this.style.background='rgba(143,212,90,.1)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(255,255,255,.32)';this.style.background=''">Our Health Topics</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="hstat"><strong>50K+</strong><span>Monthly Readers</span></div>
        <div class="hstat"><strong>200+</strong><span>Articles Published</span></div>
        <div class="hstat"><strong>7</strong><span>Core Topics</span></div>
        <div class="hstat"><strong>100%</strong><span>Science-Backed</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-cards">
      <div class="htcard"><div class="htcard-icon" style="background:rgba(143,212,90,.18)">🧠</div><div><h3>Mental Health</h3><p>Anxiety, mindfulness &amp; psychological resilience</p></div></div>
      <div class="htcard"><div class="htcard-icon" style="background:rgba(66,168,212,.18)">🥗</div><div><h3>Healthy Eating</h3><p>Nutrition science &amp; evidence-based diets</p></div></div>
      <div class="htcard"><div class="htcard-icon" style="background:rgba(245,158,11,.18)">💆</div><div><h3>Stress Management</h3><p>Cortisol, burnout prevention &amp; recovery</p></div></div>
      <div class="htcard"><div class="htcard-icon" style="background:rgba(239,68,68,.18)">💪</div><div><h3>Body Fitness</h3><p>Exercise science, training &amp; longevity</p></div></div>
      <div class="htcard"><div class="htcard-icon" style="background:rgba(16,185,129,.18)">🌍</div><div><h3>Environmental Health</h3><p>Air quality, pollution &amp; long-term health risks</p></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TOPICS — image merged with content -->
<section id="topics">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="topics-intro">
      <span class="sec-label">🌿 Our Core Topics</span>
      <h2 class="sec-title" style="margin-top:.4rem">Seven Pillars of a <em>Healthier You</em></h2>
      <p class="sec-sub">Every article we publish aligns with one of our seven core perspectives — grounded in peer-reviewed research and real-world application. Now including Environmental Health.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="topics-list">

      <!-- Mental Health -->
      <div class="topic-row">
        <div class="topic-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/5699456/pexels-photo-5699456.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Mental Health — modern inspiring wellbeing" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="topic-body">
          <div class="topic-icon">🧠</div>
          <h3>Mental Health &amp; Wellbeing</h3>
          <p>Understanding anxiety, depression, mindfulness and psychological resilience through a modern, compassionate lens. We explore therapy modalities, the neuroscience of emotion, and daily practices for a healthier mind.</p>
          <div class="tag-row"><span class="tag">Mindfulness</span><span class="tag">Anxiety</span><span class="tag">Therapy</span><span class="tag">Resilience</span></div>
          <div class="topic-vid-inline" onclick="openVid('https://www.youtube.com/embed/inpok4MKVLM')">
            <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/4100672/pexels-photo-4100672.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Mental health video" loading="lazy">
            <div class="play-over"><div class="play-circle"></div></div>
            <div class="vid-label">▶ Watch: 5-Minute Mindfulness Meditation for Clarity &amp; Calm</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Healthy Eating -->
      <div class="topic-row rev">
        <div class="topic-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1640777/pexels-photo-1640777.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Healthy eating — colourful fresh foods" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="topic-body">
          <div class="topic-icon">🥗</div>
          <h3>Healthy Eating Habits</h3>
          <p>Beyond fad diets — evidence-based nutrition covering the gut microbiome, anti-inflammatory foods, macronutrient science, and intuitive eating. We help you build a relationship with food that is sustainable, joyful, and grounded in science.</p>
          <div class="tag-row"><span class="tag">Nutrition</span><span class="tag">Gut Health</span><span class="tag">Anti-Inflammatory</span><span class="tag">Microbiome</span></div>
          <div class="topic-vid-inline" onclick="openVid('https://www.youtube.com/embed/7kGnfXXIKZM')">
            <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1092730/pexels-photo-1092730.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Healthy foods video" loading="lazy">
            <div class="play-over"><div class="play-circle"></div></div>
            <div class="vid-label">▶ Watch: Anti-Inflammatory Foods That Protect Your Body</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Stress Management -->
      <div class="topic-row">
        <div class="topic-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/3822864/pexels-photo-3822864.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Stress management — yoga and breathing" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="topic-body">
          <div class="topic-icon">💆</div>
          <h3>Stress Management</h3>
          <p>Chronic stress is a modern epidemic. We cover the biology of cortisol, burnout prevention, breathwork techniques, sleep optimisation, and the evidence-backed methods that genuinely reduce life pressure and restore balance.</p>
          <div class="tag-row"><span class="tag">Cortisol</span><span class="tag">Burnout</span><span class="tag">Breathwork</span><span class="tag">Meditation</span></div>
          <a href="#articles" class="btn-navy" style="align-self:flex-start;margin-top:.5rem">Read Stress Articles →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Science-Backed -->
      <div class="topic-row rev">
        <div class="topic-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/2280571/pexels-photo-2280571.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Scientist reviewing research data" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="topic-body">
          <div class="topic-icon">🔬</div>
          <h3>Science-Backed Methods</h3>
          <p>We cut through the noise. Every health trend we cover — from intermittent fasting to cold therapy, CGM tracking to Zone 2 training — is analysed through the lens of peer-reviewed research, clinical trials, and expert consensus. No pseudoscience. Ever.</p>
          <div class="tag-row"><span class="tag">Research</span><span class="tag">Evidence</span><span class="tag">Clinical Trials</span><span class="tag">Proven Methods</span></div>
          <a href="#articles" class="btn-navy" style="align-self:flex-start;margin-top:.5rem">Explore the Science →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Body Fitness -->
      <div class="topic-row">
        <div class="topic-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1552242/pexels-photo-1552242.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Body fitness — strength training" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="topic-body">
          <div class="topic-icon">💪</div>
          <h3>Body Fitness &amp; Exercise</h3>
          <p>From Zone 2 cardio to resistance training, mobility work to longevity protocols — our fitness content is built on exercise physiology. We help you understand how to move better, recover faster, and build a body that serves you for life.</p>
          <div class="tag-row"><span class="tag">Strength</span><span class="tag">Zone 2</span><span class="tag">Longevity</span><span class="tag">Mobility</span></div>
          <div class="topic-vid-inline" onclick="openVid('https://www.youtube.com/embed/vc1E5CfRfos')">
            <img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/4162438/pexels-photo-4162438.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Fitness training video" loading="lazy">
            <div class="play-over"><div class="play-circle"></div></div>
            <div class="vid-label">▶ Watch: Science-Based Fitness for Longevity</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Sleep -->
      <div class="topic-row rev">
        <div class="topic-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/3771069/pexels-photo-3771069.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Sleep and recovery — peaceful rest" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="topic-body">
          <div class="topic-icon">🌙</div>
          <h3>Sleep &amp; Recovery</h3>
          <p>Sleep is the foundation of every other health pillar. Poor sleep undermines your mental health, nutrition choices, stress resilience, and fitness results. We explore circadian rhythm science, sleep architecture, and practical rituals for truly restorative rest.</p>
          <div class="tag-row"><span class="tag">Circadian Rhythm</span><span class="tag">Sleep Quality</span><span class="tag">Recovery</span><span class="tag">Rest</span></div>
          <a href="#articles" class="btn-navy" style="align-self:flex-start;margin-top:.5rem">Read Sleep Articles →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Environmental Health — NEW -->
      <div class="topic-row">
        <div class="topic-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1108572/pexels-photo-1108572.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Environmental Health — air quality and pollution" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="topic-body">
          <div class="topic-icon">🌍</div>
          <h3>Environmental Health</h3>
          <p>The air we breathe, the water we drink, and the environments we inhabit profoundly shape our health. From air pollution and toxic exposures to climate-driven health risks, we explore how environmental factors affect respiratory, cardiovascular, and long-term systemic wellbeing — and what science says we can do about it.</p>
          <div class="tag-row"><span class="tag">Air Quality</span><span class="tag">Pollution</span><span class="tag">Respiratory Health</span><span class="tag">Climate & Health</span></div>
          <a href="#articles" class="btn-navy" style="align-self:flex-start;margin-top:.5rem">Read Environmental Articles →</a>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-imgcol">
        <div class="about-main-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/3985163/pexels-photo-3985163.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=900&h=600&dpr=1" alt="Health professionals team" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="about-badge"><div class="ab-icon">✅</div><div class="ab-text"><strong>100%</strong><span>Evidence-Based Content</span></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-text">
        <span class="sec-label">👥 About Us</span>
        <h2 class="sec-title" style="margin-top:.4rem">We Are <em>The Health Trend</em></h2>
        <p style="margin-top:1rem">The Health Trend was born from a simple but urgent belief: that accurate, engaging health information can genuinely change lives. In a world drowning in misinformation and wellness fads, we exist to be a clear, trustworthy voice.</p>
        <p>Our team of health writers, researchers, registered dietitians, and wellness advocates unite around one shared mission — to translate complex science into content that empowers everyday people to make better health decisions.</p>
        <div class="pillars">
          <div class="pillar"><h4>🔬 Research-Led</h4><p>Grounded in peer-reviewed science and clinical evidence</p></div>
          <div class="pillar"><h4>💚 Accessible</h4><p>Complex health made simple for every reader</p></div>
          <div class="pillar"><h4>🌍 Inclusive</h4><p>Wellness for every background, age &amp; lifestyle</p></div>
          <div class="pillar"><h4>🎯 Actionable</h4><p>Practical steps you can start implementing today</p></div>
        </div>
        <a href="#topics" class="btn-green">Explore Our Topics →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="who-box">
      <div class="who-text">
        <h3>Who We Are</h3>
        <p>We are a passionate multidisciplinary team spanning nutrition science, exercise physiology, mental health advocacy, and science communication. What unites us is a deep respect for evidence and a belief that everyone deserves access to health information that is honest, nuanced, and practical.</p>
        <p>Whether you are a curious reader or navigating a personal health journey — The Health Trend is your trusted companion.</p>
        <div class="chips"><span class="chip">Registered Dietitians</span><span class="chip">Exercise Physiologists</span><span class="chip">Mental Health Advocates</span><span class="chip">Medical Writers</span><span class="chip">Wellness Coaches</span><span class="chip">Neuroscience Researchers</span><span class="chip">Environmental Health Experts</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="who-img"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/4056723/pexels-photo-4056723.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Wellness team" loading="lazy"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ARTICLES -->
<section id="articles">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="art-header">
      <div><span class="sec-label">📰 Latest Articles</span><h2 class="sec-title" style="margin-top:.4rem">Modern Health <em>Insights</em></h2></div>
      <a href="#" class="btn-green" style="padding:.65rem 1.4rem;font-size:.85rem">View All 200+ →</a>
    </div>
    <!-- Filter tabs -->
    <div class="af-bar">
      <button class="af-btn active" data-cat="all">All Topics</button>
      <button class="af-btn" data-cat="mental">Mental Health</button>
      <button class="af-btn" data-cat="eating">Healthy Eating</button>
      <button class="af-btn" data-cat="fitness">Body Fitness</button>
      <button class="af-btn" data-cat="stress">Stress</button>
      <button class="af-btn" data-cat="sleep">Sleep</button>
      <button class="af-btn" data-cat="environmental">Environment</button>
    </div>
    <div class="arts-grid">
      <article class="acard feat">
        <div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/4498318/pexels-photo-4498318.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=900&h=600&dpr=1" alt="Gut brain axis article" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Featured · Mental Health</span></div>
        <div class="abody">
          <div class="ameta"><span>Neuroscience</span><div class="adot"></div><span>8 min read</span><div class="adot"></div><span>Mar 2025</span></div>
          <h3>The Gut-Brain Axis: How Your Microbiome Shapes Your Mental Health</h3>
          <p>Emerging research reveals the profound connection between gut bacteria and psychological wellbeing. Discover the latest findings on probiotic interventions, dietary patterns, and their measurable effects on mood, anxiety, and cognition.</p>
          <a href="#" class="alink">Read Full Article →</a>
        </div>
      </article>
      <article class="acard"><div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/3822622/pexels-photo-3822622.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Stress management article" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Stress Management</span></div><div class="abody"><div class="ameta"><span>Psychology</span><div class="adot"></div><span>6 min read</span></div><h3>Cortisol Reset: Science-Backed Protocols for Chronic Stress</h3><p>Breathwork, cold exposure, and adaptogens — a clear-eyed review of what the research actually says.</p><a href="#" class="alink">Read More →</a></div></article>
      <article class="acard"><div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1092730/pexels-photo-1092730.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Nutrition article" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Healthy Eating</span></div><div class="abody"><div class="ameta"><span>Nutrition</span><div class="adot"></div><span>5 min read</span></div><h3>Anti-Inflammatory Eating: Foods That Fight Chronic Disease</h3><p>How specific dietary choices can meaningfully reduce your inflammatory load and protect long-term health.</p><a href="#" class="alink">Read More →</a></div></article>
      <article class="acard"><div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/4162438/pexels-photo-4162438.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Fitness article" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Body Fitness</span></div><div class="abody"><div class="ameta"><span>Exercise Science</span><div class="adot"></div><span>7 min read</span></div><h3>Zone 2 Training: Why Elite Athletes Slow Down to Speed Up</h3><p>Mitochondrial biology and longevity research are transforming how the world's best athletes train.</p><a href="#" class="alink">Read More →</a></div></article>
      <article class="acard"><div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1028741/pexels-photo-1028741.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Sleep article" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Sleep Science</span></div><div class="abody"><div class="ameta"><span>Neuroscience</span><div class="adot"></div><span>5 min read</span></div><h3>Sleep Optimisation: The Science of Deep Rest in the Modern Age</h3><p>Chronotype research and circadian interventions that are transforming recovery for millions worldwide.</p><a href="#" class="alink">Read More →</a></div></article>

      <!-- NEW ARTICLES -->
      <article class="acard"><div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1640777/pexels-photo-1640777.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Epigenetics and diet" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Healthy Eating</span><span class="anew">New</span></div><div class="abody"><div class="ameta"><span>Epigenetics</span><div class="adot"></div><span>7 min read</span><div class="adot"></div><span>Mar 2026</span></div><h3>How Diet Influences Gene Expression Through Epigenetic Mechanisms</h3><p>Your diet doesn't just fuel your body — it can switch genes on and off. Discover how food creates sustained epigenetic changes affecting long-term health, disease risk, and ageing.</p><a href="#" class="alink">Read More →</a></div></article>

      <article class="acard"><div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1552252/pexels-photo-1552252.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Tabata training fitness" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Body Fitness</span><span class="anew">New</span></div><div class="abody"><div class="ameta"><span>Exercise Science</span><div class="adot"></div><span>6 min read</span><div class="adot"></div><span>Mar 2026</span></div><h3>How Tabata Training Improves VO2 Max and Cardio Fitness</h3><p>Just four minutes of supramaximal interval training can trigger powerful cardiovascular, metabolic, and psychological adaptations that rival hour-long traditional workouts.</p><a href="#" class="alink">Read More →</a></div></article>

      <article class="acard"><div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/4162438/pexels-photo-4162438.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Weight regain after dieting" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Healthy Eating</span><span class="anew">New</span></div><div class="abody"><div class="ameta"><span>Metabolism</span><div class="adot"></div><span>8 min read</span><div class="adot"></div><span>Mar 2026</span></div><h3>Why People Regain Weight After Dieting: The Science of Metabolism, Hormones &amp; Appetite</h3><p>Weight loss triggers biological adaptations — hormonal shifts, metabolic slowing, and neural reward changes — that make long-term weight maintenance profoundly challenging.</p><a href="#" class="alink">Read More →</a></div></article>

      <article class="acard"><div class="aimg"><img src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/1108572/pexels-photo-1108572.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=700&h=450&dpr=1" alt="Environmental health black rain pollution" loading="lazy"><span class="acat">Environmental Health</span><span class="anew">New</span></div><div class="abody"><div class="ameta"><span>Public Health</span><div class="adot"></div><span>7 min read</span><div class="adot"></div><span>Mar 2026</span></div><h3>Health Impacts of Black Rain: Respiratory, Cardiovascular and Long-Term Risks Explained</h3><p>From wartime oil fires to industrial accidents, black acid rain exposes millions to acidic aerosols, soot, and toxic pollutants with serious health consequences science is only beginning to map.</p><a href="#" class="alink">Read More →</a></div></article>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

          <div class="fg"><label>Email Address</label><input type="email" placeholder="jane@example.com" required></div>
          <div class="fg"><label>Subject</label><select><option value="">Select a topic...</option><option>General Inquiry</option><option>Article Suggestion</option><option>Collaboration / Partnership</option><option>Press &amp; Media</option><option>Technical Issue</option><option>Other</option></select></div>
          <div class="fg"><label>Message</label><textarea placeholder="Tell us what's on your mind..."></textarea></div>
          <button type="submit" class="f-btn">Send Message 📩</button>
        </form>
        <div class="f-ok" id="fOk">✅ Thank you! Your message has been received. We'll be in touch within 48 hours.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

      <div class="legal-tabs-row">
        <button class="legal-tab-btn" id="ltab-disclaimer" onclick="showLegal('disclaimer')">⚕️ Medical Disclaimer</button>

        <button class="legal-tab-btn" id="ltab-terms" onclick="showLegal('terms')">📋 Terms of Use</button>
        <button class="legal-tab-btn" style="margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,100,100,.55)" onclick="closeLegal()">✕ Close</button>
      </div>
      <div class="legal-content">

        <!-- DISCLAIMER -->
        <div class="legal-panel active" id="lpanel-disclaimer">
          <div class="legal-warn"><p>⚠️ <strong>Important Notice:</strong> All content on The Health Trend is for general informational purposes only. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek guidance from a qualified healthcare provider before making health decisions.</p></div>
          <div class="legal-col">
            <h3>No Medical Relationship</h3>
            <p>Reading or interacting with content on The Health Trend does not create a physician-patient or any other healthcare provider relationship. Our content is educational in nature only and does not constitute personalised medical advice.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="legal-col">
            <h3>Accuracy &amp; Mental Health</h3>
            <p>While we are committed to accurate, evidence-based content, health science evolves rapidly. The Health Trend cannot guarantee the completeness or timeliness of all published information.</p>
            <p>Our mental health content is intended to be informative and reduce stigma — it is not a substitute for professional psychological or psychiatric care. If you are in a mental health crisis, contact a professional or emergency services immediately.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="legal-col">
            <h3>Fitness, Nutrition &amp; Emergencies</h3>
            <p>Exercise and nutritional guidance on this platform is general in nature. Before beginning any new fitness programme or making significant dietary changes, consult a qualified healthcare professional.</p>
            <p><strong>In a medical emergency, call your local emergency services immediately (e.g. 911, 999, 112). Do not delay emergency care by consulting this website.</strong></p>
            <p style="margin-top:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:.78rem">Questions? <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#5e323b393f321e2a363b363b3f322a362a2c3b303a703d3133" style="color:var(--lgreen)"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="94f8f1f3f5f8d4e0fcf1fcf1f5f8e0fce0e6f1faf0baf7fbf9">[email&#160;protected]</span></a> · Last updated: March 2025</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- PRIVACY -->
        <div class="legal-panel" id="lpanel-privacy">
          <div class="legal-col" style="grid-column:span 1">
            <h3>Our Privacy Commitment</h3>
            <p>At The Health Trend, your privacy is a core value. This policy explains how we collect, use, store and protect your personal information when you visit our website or subscribe to our content.</p>
            <h3 style="margin-top:1.2rem">What We Collect</h3>
            <ul>
              <li><strong>Contact details:</strong> Name and email when you use our contact form or subscribe</li>
              <li><strong>Usage data:</strong> Pages visited, time on site — collected anonymously via analytics</li>
              <li><strong>Cookies:</strong> Session and preference cookies to improve your experience</li>
              <li><strong>Messages:</strong> Content of enquiries submitted via our contact form</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
          <div class="legal-col">
            <h3>How We Use Your Data</h3>
            <ul>
              <li>To send newsletters — only with your explicit consent</li>
              <li>To respond to your enquiries</li>
              <li>To analyse and improve content quality</li>
              <li>To comply with our legal obligations</li>
            </ul>
            <p style="margin-top:.8rem"><strong>We never sell, rent, trade or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.</strong></p>
          </div>
          <div class="legal-col">
            <h3>Your Rights &amp; Security</h3>
            <p>You have the right to access, correct, export or request deletion of your personal data at any time. Withdraw consent by clicking unsubscribe in any email or contacting us directly.</p>
            <p>We implement appropriate technical and organisational security measures to protect your information. No internet transmission is 100% secure.</p>
            <p style="margin-top:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:.78rem">Questions? <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#cebebca7b8afadb78ebaa6aba6abafa2baa6babcaba0aae0ada1a3" style="color:var(--lgreen)"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="1a6a68736c7b79635a6e727f727f7b766e726e687f747e34797577">[email&#160;protected]</span></a> · Last updated: March 2025</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- TERMS -->
        <div class="legal-panel" id="lpanel-terms">
          <div class="legal-col">
            <h3>Acceptance of Terms</h3>
            <p>By accessing or using The Health Trend website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of this website.</p>
            <h3 style="margin-top:1.2rem">Intellectual Property</h3>
            <p>All content on The Health Trend — including articles, graphics, videos, logos and branding — is our intellectual property and is protected by applicable copyright laws. You may share content with proper attribution for non-commercial purposes only.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="legal-col">
            <h3>Acceptable Use</h3>
            <ul>
              <li>Use the website for lawful, personal, non-commercial purposes only</li>
              <li>Do not attempt to disrupt or damage the website or its infrastructure</li>
              <li>Do not misrepresent your identity when contacting us</li>
              <li>Do not use automated tools to scrape or mass-download content</li>
            </ul>
            <h3 style="margin-top:1.2rem">Third-Party Links</h3>
            <p>We may link to external websites for informational purposes only. The Health Trend does not endorse and is not responsible for the content or practices of any third-party website.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="legal-col">
            <h3>Disclaimer &amp; Liability</h3>
            <p>This website is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the fullest extent permitted by law, The Health Trend shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of this website.</p>
            <h3 style="margin-top:1.2rem">Changes to Terms</h3>
            <p>We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance of updated terms. Subscribers will be notified of material changes via email.</p>
            <p style="margin-top:.8rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-size:.78rem">Questions? <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#2b474e4c4a476b5f434e434e4a475f435f594e454f05484446" style="color:var(--lgreen)"><span class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="4c20292b2d200c38242924292d203824383e292228622f2321">[email&#160;protected]</span></a> · Last updated: March 2025</p>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer-bottom">
    <div class="footer-bottom-inner">
      <p>© 2025 The Health Trend. All rights reserved. Content is for informational purposes only — not medical advice.</p>
      <p>
        <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="showLegal('disclaimer')" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);text-decoration:none;margin-right:1.2rem;font-size:.77rem;transition:color .2s" onmouseover="this.style.color='#8fd45a'" onmouseout="this.style.color='rgba(255,255,255,.35)'">Medical Disclaimer</a>
        <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="showLegal('privacy')" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);text-decoration:none;margin-right:1.2rem;font-size:.77rem;transition:color .2s" onmouseover="this.style.color='#8fd45a'" onmouseout="this.style.color='rgba(255,255,255,.35)'">Privacy Policy</a>
        <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="showLegal('terms')" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);text-decoration:none;font-size:.77rem;transition:color .2s" onmouseover="this.style.color='#8fd45a'" onmouseout="this.style.color='rgba(255,255,255,.35)'">Terms of Use</a>
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<button style="position:fixed;bottom:2rem;right:2rem;z-index:900;width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:1.1rem;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(109,179,63,.45);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s" id="btt" onclick="window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-3px) scale(1.08)';this.style.background='#4a9a2a'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='';this.style.background='var(--green)'">↑</button>

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
// Nav scroll + active
const nb=document.getElementById("navbar"),bt=document.getElementById("btt");
window.addEventListener("scroll",()=>{
  nb.classList.toggle("scrolled",scrollY>30);
  bt.style.display=scrollY>400?"flex":"none";
  ["home","topics","about","articles","videos","reviews","contact"].forEach(id=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id),lk=document.querySelector(`.nav-menu a[href="#${id}"]`);
    if(el&&lk){const t=el.offsetTop-130;lk.classList.toggle("active",scrollY>=t&&scrollY<t+el.offsetHeight)}
  });
});
document.getElementById("hamburger").addEventListener("click",()=>document.getElementById("navMenu").classList.toggle("open"));
document.querySelectorAll(".nav-menu a").forEach(a=>a.addEventListener("click",()=>document.getElementById("navMenu").classList.remove("open")));

// Video modal
function openVid(url){document.getElementById("vframe").src=url+"?autoplay=1";document.getElementById("vmodal").classList.add("open");document.body.style.overflow="hidden"}
function closeVid(e){if(!e||e.target===document.getElementById("vmodal")){document.getElementById("vframe").src="";document.getElementById("vmodal").classList.remove("open");document.body.style.overflow=""}}
document.addEventListener("keydown",e=>{if(e.key==="Escape")closeVid()});

// Legal in footer
function showLegal(id){
  const bar=document.getElementById("footerLegal");
  bar.style.display="block";
  document.querySelectorAll(".legal-panel").forEach(p=>p.classList.remove("active"));
  document.querySelectorAll(".legal-tab-btn").forEach(b=>b.classList.remove("active"));
  const panel=document.getElementById("lpanel-"+id);
  const tab=document.getElementById("ltab-"+id);
  if(panel)panel.classList.add("active");
  if(tab)tab.classList.add("active");
  bar.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth",block:"start"});
}
function closeLegal(){
  document.getElementById("footerLegal").style.display="none";
}

// Newsletter
function doSub(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  const el=document.getElementById("nlEmail");
  if(el&&el.value){
    el.value="";
    el.placeholder="✅ Subscribed! Welcome aboard.";
    setTimeout(()=>{el.placeholder="Enter your email address"},3000);
  }
  return false;
}

// Contact form
function doContact(e){
  e.preventDefault();
  document.getElementById("fOk").style.display="block";
  e.target.reset();
  setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById("fOk").style.display="none"},5000);
  return false;
}

// Article filter tabs
const filterBtns=document.querySelectorAll(".af-btn");
const artCards=document.querySelectorAll(".arts-grid .acard:not(.feat)");
filterBtns.forEach(btn=>{
  btn.addEventListener("click",()=>{
    filterBtns.forEach(b=>b.classList.remove("active"));
    btn.classList.add("active");
    const cat=btn.dataset.cat;
    artCards.forEach(card=>{
      const cardCat=card.querySelector(".acat")?.textContent?.toLowerCase()||"";
      if(cat==="all"||cardCat.includes(cat)){
        card.style.display="flex";
        card.style.animation="fadeUp .35s ease";
      } else {
        card.style.display="none";
      }
    });
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
